problem.text: Let \(A\) be an \(m\times n\) matrix (\(m\ge n\)) and let \(A=\widehat Q\widehat R\) be a reduced \(QR\) factorization of \(A\). Prove that \(A\) has full rank if and only if the diagonal entries of \(\widehat R\) are nonzero.
Assume that \(A\in\mathbb C^{n\times n}\) and there exists \(p\ge 1\) such that \(\|A\|_p<1\), where \(\|\cdot\|_p\) is a vector-induced matrix norm.

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Prove that each principal submatrix of \(A\) is Hermitian positive definite.

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Prove that an element of \(A\) with largest magnitude lies on the diagonal.

subparts.label: (c)
subparts.text: Prove that \(A\) has a Cholesky decomposition.

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Find the matrix \(P_{\mathbf v}\), the orthogonal projection onto \(\operatorname{span}\{\mathbf v\}\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Find the matrix \(P_H\), the orthogonal projection onto \(H\).

subparts.label: (c)
subparts.text: Find \(Q_H\), the unitary matrix that reflects across \(H\).

problem.text:
Let \(A,\delta A\in\mathbb R^{n\times n}\) be full rank and \(b,x\) and \(\delta x\in\mathbb R^n\). Prove that if
\[
Ax=b,\quad\text{and}\quad(A+\delta A)(x+\delta x)=b,
\]
then
\[
\frac{\|\delta x\|}{\|x+\delta x\|}\le\kappa(A)\frac{\|\delta A\|}{\|A\|},
\]
where \(\kappa(A)\) is the condition number of \(A\).
